description: Generate 10 analysis-informed YouTube titles using three-emotions framework (Curiosity/Desire/Fear)
author: POEM Team
useCase: Core title generation step. Uses all 3 content analysis outputs for richer, more targeted titles.

shortTitle.description: Short working title from configure step (anchor/starting point)

mainTopic.description: Primary topic or theme from analyze-main-topic step

statistics.description: Important numbers or counts from analyze-statistics step (may be empty)

catchyPhrases.description: Memorable direct quotes from transcript from analyze-catchy-phrases step

generatedTitles.description: 10 title options with emotion classification and character count

emotion.description: Which of the three emotions this title triggers

title.description: The title text (optimal 40-50 chars, max 70 chars for SEO)

usageNotes: Optimal CTR: 40-50 chars; SEO safe: up to 70 chars; mobile safe: under 50 chars
Front-load keywords — important words first (titles truncate on mobile)

integrationNotes.usagePattern: Single LLM call — feeds human shortlist checkpoint
